{"command":"git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add golden canary scripts as the per-batch regression-detection layer

Closes #47. Matrix sampling rotates cells between batches, so a defense
regression in week 3 can land on cells already covered in week 1 and
silently disappear from this batch's signal. Canaries close that gap with
a fixed set of 6 cells (one per A/B/C/D/E/F role) that run on every batch
with known expected outcomes — drifts surface as a CANARY DRIFT block in
summary.txt an...
